Module com.example.demo
Package com.example.demo.components

Class FoodItem

java.lang.Object
com.example.demo.components.FoodItem
public class FoodItem extends Object
Class of FoodItem, holding the relevant data of the FoodItem.
Author:
Sofia Ortega

      public FoodItem(Integer id, String name, Double price, String type)
      Constructs a food item
      Parameters:
      id - - The Integer ID number of the respective FoodItem
      name - - The String name of the FoodItem
      price - - The Double price of the FoodItem
      type - - The String category of the FoodItem (Entree, Side, Appetizer, Drink)

    • FoodItem

      public FoodItem(Integer id, String name, Double price, javafx.collections.ObservableList<InventoryItem> ingredients)
      Constructs a food item
      Parameters:
      id - - The Integer ID number of the respective FoodItem
      name - - The String name of the FoodItem
      price - - The Double price of the FoodItem
      ingredients - - The list of ingredients that make up the FoodItem

    • FoodItem

      public FoodItem(Integer id, String name, Double price, javafx.collections.ObservableList<InventoryItem> ingredients, String type)

      Parameters:

      name - - The String name of the FoodItem
      price - - The Double price of the FoodItem
      ingredients - - The list of ingredients that make up the FoodItem
      type - - The String category of the FoodItem (Entree, Side, Appetizer, Drink)
